elements.title: lang::report_page_050_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_ue.id,
       kbi_ue.timecreated                         AS enrolstart,
       kbi_ue.timeend                             AS enrolend,
       kbi_ccc.timeend,
       kbi_c.enablecompletion,
       kbi_cc.timecompleted                       AS complete,
       kbi_u.firstname,
       kbi_u.lastname,
       kbi_u.email,
       kbi_ue.userid,
       kbi_e.courseid,
       kbi_e.enrol                                AS enrols,
       CONCAT(kbi_u1.firstname, ' ', kbi_u1.lastname) AS endrolled_by,
       kbi_ue.status                              AS enrol_status,
       kbi_ra.roles                               AS course_roles,
       kbi_c.fullname                             AS course,
       kbi_c.startdate                            AS startdate,
       kbi_c.enddate                              AS enddate
FROM mdl_user_enrolments kbi_ue
       JOIN mdl_enrol kbi_e ON kbi_e.id = kbi_ue.enrolid
       JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_u.id = kbi_ue.userid
       JOIN (SELECT kbi_ctx.instanceid,
                    kbi_ra.userid,
                    MIN(kbi_ra.modifierid)                                 AS modifierid,
                    GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT(kbi_r.shortname) SEPARATOR ', ') AS roles
             FROM mdl_context kbi_ctx
                    JOIN mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra ON kbi_ra.contextid = kbi_ctx.id
                    JOIN mdl_role kbi_r ON kbi_r.id = kbi_ra.roleid
             WHERE kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
             GROUP BY kbi_ctx.instanceid, kbi_ra.userid) ra ON kbi_ra.instanceid = kbi_e.courseid AND kbi_ra.userid = kbi_ue.userid
       JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_e.courseid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_user kbi_u1 ON kbi_u1.id = kbi_ra.modifierid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course_completions kbi_cc ON kbi_cc.course = kbi_e.courseid AND kbi_cc.userid = kbi_ue.userid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course_completion_criteria kbi_ccc ON kbi_ccc.course = kbi_e.courseid AND kbi_ccc.criteriatype = 2
WHERE kbi_ue.id > 0
  AND kbi_c.id = :courseid
  AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
  AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
  AND kbi_u.username != 'guest'
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
  AND kbi_ue.status = 0
  AND kbi_e.status = 0
ORDER BY kbi_c.fullname, kbi_u.lastname, kbi_u.firstname
